requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IEC 62368-1 / LIBNOR NL Standards (220 V / 50 Hz; Type C/G/D plug environment; frequent power outages)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — IEC 62368-1/LIBNOR NL标准（220 V / 50 Hz；C/G/D型插头环境；停电频繁）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — IEC 62368-1/LIBNOR NL標準（220 V / 50 Hz；C/G/D型插頭環境；停電頻繁）

summary.en: Electrical safety for wireless and IoT devices in Lebanon is governed by LIBNOR national standards (NL series) aligned with IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — Safety Requirements) or IEC 60950-1 for legacy products. Lebanon operates on 220 V / 50 Hz. The plug socket environment is mixed: Type C (Europlug / CEE 7/16) and Type G (British BS 1363) are both common; Type D (old British) sockets also appear in older installations. Exporters must supply a device with the appropriate plug type or a universal adapter suitable for the Lebanese market. Electrical safety test reports from an internationally accredited laboratory to IEC 62368-1 (or applicable IEC standard) under LIBNOR NL standards are required as part of the TRA type approval technical file and may be required separately by customs and consumer protection authorities. Note: Lebanon has experienced severe and frequent power outages since 2019 due to the national economic crisis — devices intended for the Lebanese market should consider voltage surge and power interruption tolerance in product design.
summary.zh: 黎巴嫩无线及物联网设备的电气安全由LIBNOR国家标准（NL系列）管理，与IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息和通信技术设备 — 安全要求）或传统产品适用的IEC 60950-1对接。黎巴嫩电源规格为220 V / 50 Hz。插座环境为混合型：C型（欧标/CEE 7/16）和G型（英标BS 1363）均为常见；旧装置中也出现D型（旧英标）插座。出口商须为黎巴嫩市场提供适当插头类型的设备或通用转换器。经国际认可实验室依据IEC 62368-1（或适用IEC标准）在LIBNOR NL标准下出具的电气安全测试报告，须作为TRA型号认证技术档案的一部分，并可能需单独提交给海关和消费者保护机构。注意：由于国家经济危机，黎巴嫩自2019年起经历了严重且频繁的停电 — 面向黎巴嫩市场的设备在产品设计中应考虑电压浪涌和断电容忍度。
summary.zht: 黎巴嫩無線及物聯網裝置的電氣安全由LIBNOR國家標準（NL系列）管理，與IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊和通信技術設備 — 安全要求）或傳統產品適用的IEC 60950-1對接。黎巴嫩電源規格為220 V / 50 Hz。插座環境為混合型：C型（歐標/CEE 7/16）和G型（英標BS 1363）均為常見；舊裝置中也出現D型（舊英標）插座。出口商須為黎巴嫩市場提供適當插頭類型的裝置或通用轉換器。經國際認可實驗室依據IEC 62368-1（或適用IEC標準）在LIBNOR NL標準下出具的電氣安全測試報告，須作為TRA型號認證技術檔案的一部分，並可能需單獨提交給海關和消費者保護機構。注意：由於國家經濟危機，黎巴嫩自2019年起經歷了嚴重且頻繁的停電 — 面向黎巴嫩市場的裝置在產品設計中應考慮電壓浪涌和斷電容忍度。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video, IT and Comms Equipment Safety — Ed. 3, under LIBNOR NL adoption)
Lebanon Telecom Law 431/2002 (TRA type approval technical file)
IEC 60884-1 (plug and socket-outlet safety — Type C/G/D)
Lebanon electrical infrastructure: 220 V / 50 Hz / mixed Type C, G, D

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for in-scope wireless and IoT devices is governed by GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1) under the CCC mandatory certification system. Chinese mains voltage is 220 V / 50 Hz (Type A/I plug — flat two-pin and three-pin). CCC safety certification and GB 4943.1 test reports are China-specific and are not recognised by LIBNOR or TRA. However, because China also uses 220 V / 50 Hz, power supply compatibility may be the same, though plug type adaptation is required for the Lebanese market (Type C/G/D).
summary.zh: 在中国，CCC强制认证体系下的GB 4943.1（相当于IEC 62368-1/IEC 60950-1）管理范围内无线及物联网设备的电气安全。中国电源规格为220 V / 50 Hz（A/I型插头 — 扁平两脚和三脚）。CCC安全认证和GB 4943.1测试报告为中国特有，不被LIBNOR或TRA承认。但由于中国同样使用220 V / 50 Hz，电源兼容性可能相同，不过面向黎巴嫩市场（C/G/D型）须适配插头类型。
summary.zht: 在中國，CCC強制認證體系下的GB 4943.1（相當於IEC 62368-1/IEC 60950-1）管理範圍內無線及物聯網裝置的電氣安全。中國電源規格為220 V / 50 Hz（A/I型插頭 — 扁平兩腳和三腳）。CCC安全認證和GB 4943.1測試報告為中國特有，不被LIBNOR或TRA承認。但由於中國同樣使用220 V / 50 Hz，電源相容性可能相同，不過面向黎巴嫩市場（C/G/D型）須適配插頭類型。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (Safety of IT Equipment — China, aligns with IEC 62368-1)
China mains: 220 V / 50 Hz / Type A/I plug

gap.en: CCC certification and GB 4943.1 test reports are not accepted by LIBNOR or TRA as substitutes for IEC 62368-1 / NL-standard test reports from an internationally accredited laboratory. A new electrical safety test report to IEC 62368-1 under LIBNOR NL standards is required for the TRA type approval technical file. Plug type adaptation is required: Lebanon uses Type C and Type G (and some Type D) sockets, not the Chinese Type A/I. Power supply design must tolerate 220 V / 50 Hz. Given Lebanon's severe power infrastructure problems since 2019 (frequent outages, voltage instability), surge and power-interruption tolerance is a practical design consideration for devices intended for the Lebanese market.
gap.zh: CCC认证和GB 4943.1测试报告不被LIBNOR或TRA接受为国际认可实验室IEC 62368-1/NL标准测试报告的替代。TRA型号认证技术档案须提供依据IEC 62368-1在LIBNOR NL标准下出具的新电气安全测试报告。须适配插头类型：黎巴嫩使用C型和G型（及部分D型）插座，而非中国A/I型。电源设计须适配220 V / 50 Hz。鉴于黎巴嫩自2019年以来的严重电力基础设施问题（停电频繁、电压不稳），浪涌和断电容忍度是面向黎巴嫩市场设备的实际设计考量。
gap.zht: CCC認證和GB 4943.1測試報告不被LIBNOR或TRA接受為國際認可實驗室IEC 62368-1/NL標準測試報告的替代。TRA型號認證技術檔案須提供依據IEC 62368-1在LIBNOR NL標準下出具的新電氣安全測試報告。須適配插頭類型：黎巴嫩使用C型和G型（及部分D型）插座，而非中國A/I型。電源設計須適配220 V / 50 Hz。鑑於黎巴嫩自2019年以來的嚴重電力基礎設施問題（停電頻繁、電壓不穩），浪涌和斷電容忍度是面向黎巴嫩市場裝置的實際設計考量。

source.publisher: LIBNOR — Lebanese Standards Institution (مؤسسة المقاييس اللبنانية)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety testing to IEC 62368-1 under LIBNOR NL standards from an internationally accredited laboratory is mandatory as part of the TRA type approval technical file. CCC and GB 4943.1 reports are not accepted substitutes. Plug type adaptation (Type C/G for Lebanon) and power supply tolerance for Lebanon's 220 V / 50 Hz infrastructure (with frequent outage conditions) are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 国际认可实验室依据IEC 62368-1在LIBNOR NL标准下出具的电气安全测试报告，作为TRA型号认证技术档案的一部分为强制要求。CCC和GB 4943.1报告不可作为替代。须适配插头类型（黎巴嫩C/G型），电源须适应黎巴嫩220 V / 50 Hz基础设施（含停电频繁情况）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 國際認可實驗室依據IEC 62368-1在LIBNOR NL標準下出具的電氣安全測試報告，作為TRA型號認證技術檔案的一部分為強制要求。CCC和GB 4943.1報告不可作為替代。須適配插頭類型（黎巴嫩C/G型），電源須適應黎巴嫩220 V / 50 Hz基礎設施（含停電頻繁情況）。
